title: acilepis silhetensis
intro: Acilepis silhetensis, also known as the Silhet Acilepis, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is native to the northeastern region of India and parts of Bangladesh. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Acilepis silhetensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems, with herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts being used to harness its medicinal properties.
